title: Montserrat&GlowSans Font Pack
description: A Minecraft font pack mixed with GlowSans and Montserrat
body:
# Montserrat & GlowSans Font Pack

## Introduction
**Montserrat & GlowSans Font Pack** is a resource pack that focuses solely on modifying the fonts in Minecraft. By replacing the game's default fonts, this pack brings a modern and clean look to your game's interface, enhancing the readability and aesthetic of menus, dialogues, and other UI elements.

## Features
- **Elegant Montserrat Font**: Montserrat is a popular sans-serif font known for its clarity and simplicity. It brings a stylish, modern feel to the Minecraft interface, perfect for players who appreciate minimalist design.
- **Clean GlowSans CJK Font**: GlowSans is a font specifically designed for CJK (Chinese, Japanese, Korean) characters, known for its clean and legible design. This font pack is optimized to improve the display of CJK text in Minecraft, ensuring clarity and beauty for non-Latin characters.
- **Font-Only Modification**: This resource pack only modifies the fonts in Minecraft, leaving all other visual elements and sounds untouched.
- **Wide Compatibility**: This resource pack is compatible with Minecraft versions 1.14 to 1.21. It requires no additional configuration—simply install and enjoy.

## Installation Guide
1. Download the `Montserrat & GlowSans Font Pack.zip` file.
2. Open your Minecraft game directory and locate the `resourcepacks` folder.
3. Drag and drop the downloaded `.zip` file into the `resourcepacks` folder.
4. Launch Minecraft, go to the settings menu, and select the resource packs option.
5. Enable the `Montserrat & GlowSans Font Pack` from the list of available packs.
6. Confirm and apply the changes, and you're all set to enjoy the new fonts!

## Compatibility
This resource pack has been tested and is compatible with Minecraft versions 1.14 to 1.21.

---

**Enjoy a unique Minecraft experience with improved fonts!**
